_comment: Decision recorded with verification_status=evidence and a follow-up confirmation. Two MCP calls: track, then verify with user_confirmation.

args.title: Switch image hosting to S3
args.description: Migrate all user-uploaded images from local disk to S3.
args.rationale: Cheaper at scale, CDN-ready, removes single-host failure mode for uploads.
args.restore_step: terraform apply in infra/s3-images/ — secrets in Vault

evidence_links.notes: Staging deploy green, latency p95 dropped 40%

args.notes: 30-day check-in: production p95 stable at 110ms, no upload failures, $28/mo actual cost
